title: ZXPong Achievements
description: Review known ZXPong achievement milestones for repeat play, Solo wins, hard AI wins, and rally consistency.
summary: ZXPong achievements reward repeat sessions, Solo wins, hard AI success, and long rallies.

sections.heading: Known achievements
paragraphs: Current gameplay includes play-count achievement definitions and Solo/rally milestone targets.
Use this page as a practical planning guide until final public Game Center display names are verified.

sections.heading: Planning progress
paragraphs: For repeat-play milestones, keep sessions short and consistent rather than trying to force every goal in one long run.
For Solo and rally achievements, use AI difficulty settings to practice timing before attempting harder goals.

featureShowcases.heading: ZXPong achievements
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements give ZXPong players optional goals beyond a single run or match.
body: This matters because players often want a reason to revisit the game after learning the basics. Achievement goals add structure without changing the core arcade loop.
Players use this page after playing to understand which progress surfaces are supported and how achievements relate to regular sessions.
bullets: Connects repeat play to optional goals.
Keeps achievement wording tied to supported game behaviour.
Pairs naturally with leaderboards and tips.

image.caption: ZXPong achievement artwork supports optional progression goals.
